discrepancies.title: Net Worth vs Income Reconciliation Failure
discrepancies.description: Calculated Net Worth is ₹12,413,243, but 5-year family income is only ₹964,665. Unexplained wealth discrepancy of ₹11,448,578.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Self Residential Buildings purchased in 2019 for ₹85,000 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹110,588) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹1,700,000.

discrepancies.title: Suspicious Property Overvaluation
discrepancies.description: Spouse Residential Buildings purchased in 2014 for ₹28,000 (CII Indexed Cost: ₹43,867) is declared at highly inflated value of ₹4,000,000.

discrepancies.title: Gold Heavily Undervalued (Tax/Duty Evasion)
